title: Ancient Enchantment Temple
description: Adds an ancient temple with an enchantment table and some hidden loot
body:
This mod introduces a new ancient temple structure to the game, at the top of the temple, you'll find an enchantment table.

Additionally, there's a hidden entrance to a loot room containing all the items you need to enchant your first equipment. 

The temple only spawns in jungle biomes.
![Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50b0639c6f7a175a9d6b355f4474efad38431dde.jpeg)
Feel free to put it in your modpack!
